generated_oml:

namespace base = "http://example.org/base#"

instance ThermalIncubatorTemperatureSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Temperature sensor monitoring the incubator chamber for precise thermal regulation",
    DTDFVocab:producedData ThermalIncubatorTemperatureDataTransmitted
]

instance ThermalIncubatorTemperatureDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom ThermalIncubatorTemperatureSensor
]

instance SafetyViolationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Alert triggered when temperature exceeds safe operational limits"
]

instance PerformanceMonitoringInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time assessment of system performance against optimal parameters"
]

instance TemperaturePredictionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Forecasted temperature trends for the incubator chamber"
]

instance OptimalTemperatureSettingInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Calculated ideal temperature for sample stability under current conditions"
]

instance FaultDetectedInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Identification of unexpected thermal behavior indicating potential fault"
]

instance CurrentStateEstimateInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Estimated current thermal state of the incubator system"
]

instance ActuationCommandAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automatic adjustment of heating elements based on control algorithms",
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance MonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Continuous assessment of system safety and optimal performance using calibrated thermal models",
    DTDFVocab:provides SafetyViolationInsight, PerformanceMonitoringInsight
]

instance PredictionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Simulates current operating conditions to predict future thermal behavior",
    DTDFVocab:provides TemperaturePredictionInsight
]

instance OptimizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Determines optimal temperature settings for biological sample stability",

]

instance FaultDetectionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Detects anomalies in thermal behavior using sensor data and model outputs",

]

instance StateEstimationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Estimates current state of the incubator system using sensor data and models",
    DTDFVocab:provides CurrentStateEstimateInsight
]

instance ControlService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Implements supervisory control actions based on state estimates and fault detection",
    DTDFVocab:provides ActuationCommandAction
]

instance RabbitMQ : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Message queuing server for real-time data transmission between physical and digital components",
    DTDFVocab:enables MonitoringService, PredictionService, FaultDetectionService, StateEstimationService
]

instance Scipy : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python Scipy package for optimization and model calibration functions",
    DTDFVocab:enables OptimizationService
]

instance ThermalIncubatorTemperatureData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time temperature data stream from physical sensor",

    base:desc "CAD model representing physical dimensions of the incubator chamber and components",

]

instance ThermalIncubatorAnalyticalModel : DTDFVocab:Model [

]

instance RaspberryPiController : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Physical controller managing heating and cooling components for precise thermal regulation"
]

instance LaboratoryEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Laboratory setting requiring precise temperature regulation for biological samples",

]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Changes to the Physical Twin are initiated by human operators or algorithmic decisions following detection of system violations by monitors, based on the Digital Twin's analysis of sensor data and model updates."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Model fidelity is ensured via calibration algorithms that adjust parameters to minimize residual error against sensor data, with continuous monitoring against safety and optimality thresholds. Detected violations trigger corrective actions to the Physical Twin."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
